name: python3-pycparser
title: python3-pycparser
description:
C parser in Python 3
pycparser is a complete parser of the C language, written in pure Python using
the PLY parsing library. It parses C code into an AST and can serve as a
front-end for C compilers or analysis tools.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pycparser because C parser in Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pycparser as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pycparser with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pycparser --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
